name: Corn Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook 1-2 cups of corn pasta in the microwave according to package instructions.
2. Add 2 cups of water to the cooked pasta and stir until well combined.
3. Season with salt.
4. Stir in 1-2 cups of chopped Roma tomatoes.
5. Add fresh oregano, parsley, chives or green onions.
6. Stir in 6-12 chopped mushrooms.
